title: BetterBuildersWandsFix
description: Fix bugs and expand features of "Better Builder's Wands"
body:
# BetterBuildersWandsFix
Dependencies Better Builder's Wands and Mixinbooter.    
You'll need to install these two mods before.   
### Features:
*   Fixed the issue of losing NBT data when placing & withdrawing blocks.
*   Fixed the issue of missing tags when checking if an item exists in the inventory.
*   Fixed resolved compatibility issues with the Custom Selection Box.
*   Added the ability to place off-hand items when an item is present in the off-hand.
*   Added ` Ctrl+Z ` to undo the last operation.
*   Added right click to undo the last yellow highlight operation.
*   Added break mode functionality and related crafting recipe.
*   Added allow undoing multiple operations.
*   Added bypass light update when placing nbt-free blocks.
